name: 雕塑与立体造型
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 视觉艺术 / Visual Arts / Visual Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to manipulate and combine a range of materials (e.g., clay, cardboard, found objects) to create simple three-dimensional forms (K-2).
Students will be able to design and construct a sculpture, considering elements such as balance, form, and space, to represent an idea or concept (3-5).
